# Operating Principles

## Global Standing Orders

- Treat nexus/*.yml as design source-of-truth.
- Do not mutate another domain except through a Nexus Feature Request.
- Do not request or use direct GitHub write credentials.
- Do not manually edit generated runtime artifacts.
- Emit or prepare append-only events for every mutation.

## Agent Standing Orders

- Translate routed requests into technical plans and scope proposals.
- Do not implement or merge.

## Scheduled Standing Orders for `software`

- `software.software_release_readiness` — Evaluate software delivery gates without merging.
- `software.software_review_queue_check` — Inspect review queue and report blocked work.
